Contains Asset & Policy Contract Definition Defines the content and rules of data offers Contract Offer Dynamically generated, not persisted Contains Asset & Policy Policy Technically processable (based on ODRL) Asset Describes the data with meta information based on Data Address Specifies where to find the data source has Transfer Process Current state of a transfer. Links asset, contract and data sink. Turnkey solution Have reliable, user-friendly solution available in minutes instead of months Connector-as-a-Service (CaaS) Easiest data sharing and integration to Data Space Managed service Build on managed service at less than 10% of costs vs. inhouse operation Effortless compliance Solution always compliant with latest standard and specific Data SpaceExample: EDC Connector to join Catena-X sovity introduction to Railway-X | November 2025 #003066 #5DA9FF #D4E6F8 #F1F8FF #061D3B #0B3556 #1A759B #737687 #F2F2F2 #F7B500 #DB765F #B620E0 #7670EF #32C5FFCopyright © 2025 by sovity GmbH. All rights reserved. What it is Standardized notifications that allow companies to quickly share critical quality issues across the value chain. Why it matters Instead of relying on slow, manual processes, alerts and block information are exchanged digitally and securely, enabling immediate corrective actions and preventing defective parts from moving further in production. Benefit Faster containment of issues, reduced risk of recalls, and improved trust between partners. sovity introduction to Railway-X | November 2025 Quality notifications & Block notifications Data-driven quality in action #003066 #5DA9FF #D4E6F8 #F1F8FF #061D3B #0B3556 #1A759B #737687 #F2F2F2 #F7B500 #DB765F #B620E0 #7670EF #32C5FFCopyright © 2025 by sovity GmbH.
